name: The Smolder
description: A world where the ground itself never stops burning: peat fires creep underground for years and grey ash falls like snow. Old stone causeways thread across smoldering steppes, glass flats where the heat ran hottest, and ember canyons that glow at night. Nomads follow the roads between fires, and everything that lives here has learned to wear the heat.
mood: Grey, hot, and restless, with smoke on every horizon and embers underfoot. There are no towns here, only long roads and the people who keep moving along them.
biome: smoldering ash steppe with glass flats and ember canyons
enemies:
FODDER
- Ash Jackal — fast melee, hunts in packs. A lean grey dog caked in pale ash.
- Soot Crow — flying harasser, pecks then retreats. A black bird trailing smoke from its wings.
- Cinder Crawler — slow melee, bursts into sparks on death. A dog-sized beetle with glowing cracks across its shell.
- Charcoal Burner — weak ranged, lobs hot coals. A soot-streaked laborer with a rake and a sack of embers.

STANDARD
- Ash Nomad — basic melee with a machete. A wiry traveler wrapped in ash-grey cloth.
- Nomad Archer — ranged, fire-tipped arrows. A hooded traveler carrying a short horn bow.
- Smoke Walker — melee that blinds adjacent foes with smoke. A figure shrouded in a constant haze.
- Slag Hound — tanky melee beast, soaks hits. A heavyset hound with cracked, glassy black hide.

ELITE
- Ember Brute — heavy melee, hits hard and slow. A huge man with skin like cooling lava.
- Firebrand — caster, throws fire and ignites tiles. A robed nomad swinging a burning torch.
- Glass Golem — tank construct, reflects some damage. A lumbering figure of black volcanic glass.
- Pyre Drake — flying, breathes a cone of fire. A lean reptile with smoldering, ember-lit wings.

BOSS
- Cinder Giant — massive melee, slams the ground to scatter sparks. A towering figure of charred rock veined with embers.
- Ash Warlord — commander, buffs nearby nomads, heavy blade. A scarred chief in soot-blackened plate.
- Smoke Serpent — large, drifts through walls, wide smoke attacks. A long coiling body of rolling smoke and live coals.
- Furnace Beast — huge tanky quadruped, burns whatever strikes it. A bull-like beast with a glowing furnace in its chest.
items:
- Machete (weapon (sword), common): A heavy chopping blade favored by nomads.
- Cinder Blade (weapon (sword), uncommon): A smoldering sword that burns what it cuts.
- Slag Sword (weapon (sword), rare): A thick black-glass blade that hits very hard.
- Glass Spear (weapon (spear), common): A spear tipped with razor volcanic glass.
- Ember Pike (weapon (spear), uncommon): A long spear wreathed in heat, scorching on hit.
- Coal Axe (weapon (axe), common): A charcoal-burner's heavy wood axe.
- Slag Maul (weapon (two-handed), rare): A massive slag hammer that crushes armor.
- Horn Bow (weapon (bow), common): A short recurve bow of bone and horn.
- Ember Bow (weapon (bow), uncommon): Fires arrows that ignite on impact.
- Ash Staff (weapon (staff), uncommon): A charred staff that flings burning cinders.
- Slag Shield (armor (shield), common): A heavy plate of cooled slag.
- Glass Buckler (armor (shield), uncommon): A small shield of fused volcanic glass.
- Ash Cloak (accessory, uncommon): A soot-grey cloak that softens incoming heat.
- Ember Charm (accessory, rare): A live coal on a cord that adds fire to your attacks.
- Health Potion (consumable, common): Restores a chunk of health.
- Firebomb (consumable, uncommon): A clay pot of pitch that bursts into flame.
